resources.string: Captures the visible screen, scrolls forward, and stitches the frames into one long screenshot when you start the Long screenshot action.

While a step-capture session is active, captures the screen each time you tap and marks where you tapped, then assembles a numbered guide. Nothing is captured unless you start a session from the Step capture tile.
Step capture started — tap through your steps, then tap the tile again to finish.
Could not build the step guide.
Clean, redact, and export screenshots - v%1$s
Allow photos/videos so SnapCrop can find screenshots. Notifications keep monitoring visible and provide edit/share actions.
You granted access to only selected photos. The screenshot monitor needs full media access to detect new screenshots automatically. Tap below and choose “Allow all”.
Optional display-over-apps access lets the editor appear immediately. Without it, the screenshot notification still opens the editor.
Active - new screenshots open in the editor
Paused - turn on to catch screenshots automatically
Open the editor with auto-crop, redaction, OCR, and export tools.
SnapCrop waits, then opens the next screenshot it detects.
Scroll, stitch, save, and open the result automatically.
Enable Accessibility once, then capture from Quick Settings.
Wrap a screenshot in a polished phone frame.
Trim recordings or grab a frame to edit.
Screenshots are detected automatically when the monitor is active. Exports follow your format and location settings.
This removes the exported crop from your media library. The source screenshot is not touched.
%1$d images will be bundled with metadata.
Configure the network target in Settings
Network upload is off in Settings
%1$d images will be renamed in place.

Long Screenshot uses Android Accessibility only after you start the action. It captures the visible screen, reads window structure enough to scroll, and performs scroll gestures to stitch frames. Frames stay on this device and are saved to your SnapCrop folder; SnapCrop does not upload or share Accessibility data. You can skip this and still use manual crop, stitch, gallery, and editor tools.
Long screenshot requires Android 11 or newer
Enable SnapCrop Long screenshot, then add its Quick Settings tile.
Screenshot detected — tap notification to edit
%1$s output - Save replaces the source screenshot
%1$s output - Save keeps the source screenshot
When ON (default), manual Save deletes the screenshot you cropped from. Android may ask you to confirm deletion.
Save a .snapcrop.json file next to exports so crops, redactions, and layers can be reopened later. Keeps the source image when enabled.
Use built-in visual templates to strip Reddit, X/Twitter, and similar app chrome during auto-crop.
Opt-in local index for screenshot names, source hints, dimensions, favorites, and categories. Stored only on this device.
PNG is lossless, JPEG/WebP are smaller files
Auto-adjust quality to meet a file size budget
Available when JPEG or WebP is selected
Remove EXIF data (location, device info) when sharing for privacy
Select the script for text recognition (OCR, search, redaction). Non-Latin scripts download a model via Play Services on first use.
Save draw tool styles and load them quickly in the editor.
No presets saved yet. Use the + button in the editor\'s draw mode to save your current tool style.
Off by default. Reports stay local unless you explicitly upload from the report dialog.
Imgur uploads selected images, not PDF reports.
Example: Bearer token or Basic credentials. Leave blank for no auth.
Stamp diagonal repeating text on saved images
Resume screenshot monitor after device restart
When ON, recognized app screenshots can auto-redact sensitive text and save into app-specific albums.
When ON, sharing scans for sensitive text (emails, phone numbers, cards) and offers to pixelate it before the share sheet opens.
When ON, the editor is marked secure: other apps can\'t screenshot or screen-record it, and it\'s hidden in Recents. Also blocks your own screenshots of the editor.
SnapCrop found %d area(s) that may contain sensitive info. Share with these areas pixelated?
Back up your settings, presets, and app rules to a file you can restore after a reinstall. Network credentials are not included.
Not a valid SnapCrop settings backup.
Auto-crop, annotate, and redact screenshots instantly.
%1$d crash report(s) saved on this device. Nothing is sent anywhere unless you share it.
Couldn\'t reach GitHub. Check your connection and try again.
On launch, anonymously check GitHub for a newer release. No account, no tracking — just a version query.
SnapCrop v%1$s is available on GitHub.
v%1$s is on GitHub. Tap to download.
Built-in and user-trained rules can crop app chrome, then Quick Crop auto-actions can route matching exports.
Rules are saved, but App crop profiles is off.
Preview crop: %1$s left, %2$s top, %3$s right, %4$s bottom
Requires Quick Crop auto-actions. Matching manual editor crops are never silently redacted.
A rule needs a name plus at least one source hint or OCR keyword.
Copy exports a JSON pack. Import merges pasted profiles by id.
No app rule matched this image
Test image could not be opened
Replacing the source after the crop is written
Writing a separate copy to your save location
This removes the source image from your library. Saved copies and shared exports stay where they are.
This project sidecar does not include a source image URI.
SnapCrop could not open this project sidecar: %1$s
The original image referenced by this project is missing or inaccessible: %1$s
Share, report, rename, resize, or delete
Allow display over other apps in Settings to pin screenshots
Search names, source hints, and indexed categories…
Grant media access or add photos to see them here.
No matching albums or smart groups
This album is empty or its items are no longer available.
Detected by filename and screen-size signals
Browser, Reddit, X/Twitter, YouTube, social pages
QR, barcode, Wi-Fi, and authenticator screenshots
Perspective crop: drag corners to correct distortion
Draw, place text, or add a callout to create a layer.
Transform isn\'t available for fill, blur, or smart-erase layers.
No text found in this image
Tap Add to pick two or more images to stitch together.
Add one more image to create a stitched output.
Pick images to build a collage layout.
Add at least 2 images to save
Pick an image to wrap in a device frame.
Frame saved and opened in editor
Move the scrubber to preview a frame
Trim recordings or grab a frame to edit.
Frames open in the editor. Trimmed clips save to Movies/SnapCrop.
Long screenshot starts in %1$ds. Open the target screen.
Long screenshot starts now. Keep the screen still.
Tap a color to copy its hex code
Preparing subject segmentation on device. First run may download a Play Services model over Wi-Fi.
Downloading the %1$s translation model over Wi-Fi. Keep the app open and retry if Play Services asks for storage.
Google Play services needs attention (%1$s). Update Play services, free storage if prompted, then retry.
Connect to Wi-Fi so Google Play services can download the %1$s model, then retry.
Free device storage so Google Play services can prepare %1$s, then retry.
Update Google Play services and retry %1$s.
The %1$s model is not ready yet. Connect to Wi-Fi, keep SnapCrop open, and retry.
